description: Video recommendation algorithm based on readiness assessment results for rounding 4-digit numbers

excellent_performance.rationale: Student has excellent prerequisite knowledge in place value and basic rounding, can move quickly through 4-digit rounding

ready_performance.rationale: Student is ready with good foundation, provide complete coverage of all rounding concepts

partial_readiness.rationale: Student has gaps in prerequisites, needs review of place value and/or basic rounding before main content

adaptiveLogic.description: Select prerequisite videos based on specific weak concepts

exampleSequence.reason: Review: Basic Rounding to Nearest Ten
Start main topic: Introduction to 4-digit rounding

not_ready.rationale: Student needs significant prerequisite review in place value and basic rounding before attempting 4-digit rounding

videoSequence.reason: Begin main content: Rounding to nearest ten

postPlaylistAction.message: After watching these prerequisite videos, retake the readiness quiz to check if you're ready to continue with the full rounding topic.

conceptBasedRemediation.description: Map specific weak concepts to remedial videos

number_line.conceptName: Number line and position of numbers

comprehensionCheckpoints.description: Quick checks during video watching to adjust playlist

questions.question: Round 3,456 to the nearest ten.
questions.explanation: Look at the ones digit: 6. Since 6 is 5 or above, round up. 3,456 → 3,460.

questions.question: Round 7,823 to the nearest ten.
questions.explanation: Look at the ones digit: 3. Since 3 is below 5, round down. 7,823 → 7,820.

ifAllCorrect.message: Great! You understand rounding to nearest ten.

ifAllWrong.reason: Student still struggling with basic rounding to nearest ten

checkpoints.checkpointName: Rounding to All Place Values Check

questions.question: Round 4,678 to the nearest thousand.
questions.explanation: Look at the hundreds digit: 6. Since 6 is 5 or above, round up. 4,678 → 5,000.

questions.question: Round 2,345 to the nearest hundred.
questions.explanation: Look at the tens digit: 4. Since 4 is below 5, round down. 2,345 → 2,300.

ifAllCorrect.reason: Student ready for advanced challenge problems

ifSomeCorrect.message: Good progress! Continue to practice video for more examples.

ifAllWrong.message: Let's review the rounding rules. Rewatch videos 3 and 4 before continuing.

skip_ahead.action: Skip remaining basic videos, jump to applications or challenge

add_support.action: Pause main topic, insert prerequisite review videos on rounding rules

suggest_break.trigger: After 4 videos watched in a single session
suggest_break.action: Suggest taking a 5-minute break before continuing

recommend_practice.trigger: Student completes all core videos but scores < 70% on checkpoint
recommend_practice.action: Recommend additional practice exercises before practice quiz

recommend_retake.trigger: Student in not_ready category completes all prerequisite videos
recommend_retake.action: Strongly recommend retaking readiness assessment before proceeding to main content

high_score.message: Excellent! You have strong prerequisite knowledge of place value and rounding. We've created a fast-track playlist focusing on rounding 4-digit numbers with challenges.

good_score.message: Good work! You understand the basics of rounding. Let's build on that with 4-digit numbers. Your playlist covers all important rounding concepts.

partial_score.message: You have some gaps in prerequisite knowledge. Don't worry! We'll start with review videos on place value and basic rounding, then move to 4-digit rounding.

low_score.message: You need to review prerequisite concepts first. We've created a playlist focused on building a strong foundation in place value and rounding basics. After watching, you can retake the quiz.

conceptProgressionMap.description: Shows how rounding concepts build on each other

playlistCompletion.description: % of students who watch >= 80% of recommended videos

practiceQuizPassRate.description: % of students who score >= 70% on practice quiz after watching playlist

videoRelevanceRating.description: Average student rating (out of 5) for playlist helpfulness

timeToMastery.description: Average minutes from readiness quiz to practice quiz pass

conceptRetention.description: % of students who can correctly round 4-digit numbers to different place values 1 week later

ruleApplication.description: % of students who can correctly identify which digit to look at for rounding

implementationNotes.recommendedValidation: Test with 15-20 Grade 4 students across all readiness levels

expectedOutcomes.excellent_students: Complete in 30-35 minutes with 85-95% practice quiz score
expectedOutcomes.ready_students: Complete in 40-50 minutes with 75-85% practice quiz score
expectedOutcomes.partial_students: Complete in 45-55 minutes with 65-75% practice quiz score (after prerequisite review)
expectedOutcomes.not_ready_students: Require prerequisite review (45 min) + retake + main content (30 min) = 75-85 total minutes, expected 55-70% on practice quiz

commonChallenges.challenge1: Students confusing which digit to look at for different place values
commonChallenges.solution1: Emphasize pattern: to round to tens, look at ones; to hundreds, look at tens; to thousands, look at hundreds
commonChallenges.challenge2: Students forgetting the rounding rule (5 or above)
commonChallenges.solution2: Frequent reminders and visual aids showing the rule
commonChallenges.challenge3: Rounding to wrong place value (asked for hundred, rounded to ten)
commonChallenges.solution3: Comprehension checks that specifically test place value identification
